channel.title: I Fight Cancer and Win on My Hugo
channel.description: Recent content in I Fight Cancer and Win on My Hugo

item.description: Date Event Description 06-23 stool test Dr. Tony Lee, walkin clinic, 粪检, 屁多恶臭 07-14 colonoscopy/biopsy Dr. Wong, Richmond Hospital, found rectum cancer 发现直肠癌，肠镜，活检 07-20 CT exam Richmond Hospital, follow-up exam 07-29 virtual visit BC Cancer Association involved 08-05 colonoscopy St Paul Hospital, first vist Dr. Karimuddin, UBC professior 08-15 MRI Richmond Hospital 08-23 Dr. Lefrefne

Date Event Description 01-11 ultrasound BCC, reason: liver 超声波，肝 01-13 install port UBC Hospital, implanted venous access device (IVAD) 01-20 chemotherapy BCC, restore chemo therapy with port, cycle 3, biweekly 01-30 ultrasound lifelab, liver 02-03 chemo BCC cycle 4 02-17 chemo BCC cycle 5 02-22 training Train to remove chemotherapy bottle at home 03-03 chemo BCC cycle 6 03-13 CT scan BCC 03-17 chemo cycle 7

Date Event Description 01-12 CT scan St. Paul Hospital 02-26 install chest port @UBC 03-04 chemo cycle 1, biweekly 03-18 chemo cycle 2 04-01 chemo cycle 3 04-15 chemo cycle 4 04-29 chemo cycle 5 05-07 CT/PET scans @BCC 05-13 chemo cycle 6 05-14 Dr. Oldani first time meet Dr. Oldani consulting liver surgery 05-27 chemo cycle 7 06-10 chemo cycle 8 06-14 MRI @ Richmond Hospital 06-24 chemo cycle 9 07-08 chemo cycle 10 07-13 travel until 07-18, traval to Kootenay national park 07-22 chemo cycle 11 08-05 chemo cycle 12 08-13 CT scan @BCC 08-19 chemo cycle 13 09-19 pre-op pre-op clinic for liver surgery @VGH 09-27 CT scan @VGH 10-08 Liver Surgery @VGH 10-17 remove chest port @UBC, due to port expose 11-14 CT scan @UBC 11-26 Dr.

Date Event Description 01-29 Dr. Gill. 02-07 MRI @SPH 02-19 PET scan @BCC 03-01 CT scan @UBC 03-14 Travel traval to China until 03-31 04-03 install port @UBC 04-11 chemo cycle 1 biweekly GIFFIRB 04-25 chemo cycle 2 05-09 chemo cycle 3 05-23 chemo cycle 4 06-06 chemo cycle 5 06-20 chemo cycle 6 07-02 CT scan @BCC 07-04 chemo cycle 7 07-18 chemo cycle 8 08-01 chemo cycle 9

Date Event Description 01-02 chemo cycle 1 biweekly GIFOLFOX 01-14 Dr. Gill new treatment follow-up 01-16 chemo cycle 2 01-30 chemo cycle 3 02-12 Dr. Gill 02-13 chemo cycle 4 02-27 chemo cycle 5 03-12 Dr. Gill 03-13 chemo cycle 6 03-18 CT Scan @BCC measure tumors, note 1 03-26 Dr. Gill GIAVPANI, skip chemo 03-27 03-26 CT Scan @BCC checking heart clog 04-0? chemo cycle ? 04-0? chemo cycle

item.title: Calender 2022-2024
item.description: Date Event Description 2022 06-23 stool test Dr. Tony Lee, walkin clinic, 粪检, 屁多恶臭 07-14 coloscopy/biopsy Dr. Wong, Richmond Hospital, found rectum cancer 发现直肠癌，肠镜，活检 07-17 CT exam Richmond Hospital, follow-up exam 07-29 virtual visit BC Cancer Association involved 08-05 coloscopy St Paul Hospital, first vist Dr. Karimuddin, UBC professior 08-15 MRI Richmond Hospital 08-23 Dr.

item.title: Contacts
item.description: BC Cancer Association Chemotherapy Dr. Karamjit Gill (604) 877-6000 x2856 secretary Sarah assistant Shelly nurse line 1-833-818-6626 appointment (604) 877-6218 x3 Radiation Dr. Lefresne (604) 877-6000 x5177 Internal Medicine Dr. Briam Kim secretary Io Verona Diamond Health Care Center 7th floor, station 3 (604) 875-5181 Others Dentist Dr. Angela Wong (604) 879-5855 app@dentalreconstructions.com https://dentalreconstructions.com London Drugs #11 5971 No. 3 Road (604) 278-4521 fax 604-268-4898

item.title: Medicines Notes
item.description: 2025-04-11 ~ 2025-12-19 GIFFIRB Fluorouracil (5FU) Folinic Acid (leucovorin) Irinotecan Bevacizumab 2026-01-02 ~ 2026-03-13 GIFOLFOX Folinic Acid (leucovorin) Fluorouracil (5FU) OXalipatin 2025-04-11 - 2026-03-13 (before + after each therapy) Ondansetron 8mgx1 Dexamethasone 4mgx2 + 4mgx1x2x2 Metoclopramide +5mgx2 (up to 4 times/day, optional, never taken) Aprepitant (Emend) 120mgx1 + 80mgx1 (require x2) Olanzapine 2.5mgx1 (2025-06-05 ~ 2025-07-04) Diarrhea Relief Loperamide (Imodium) Hydrochloride tablets (2mg) Nystatin (anit-fangal mouth wash) 2025-05 CT scan image contrast enhancement injection Vitamins (irregularly) C B100 D+Calium important note high-dose vitamin C and complex B supplements are often avoided during chemotherapy or radiation treatments.

item.title: Terms
item.description: colorectal liver metastases (CRLM) metastasis 转移 cancer metastasis 癌症转移 ; 癌转移
